_purpose: Smoke-shape input fixture for the doe.tsir.real.attention_head512_f16kv kernel. Same structural blocker as attention_head256_f16kv: the bootstrap oracle has no attention bodyOp support yet (D3 schema work pending). This fixture exists so the canary can locate paired inputs and produce a 'not_implemented' deferred receipt rather than FileNotFoundError. Real-shape dims are HEAD_DIM=512, BLOCK_SIZE=32.

_smokeContract._note: Smoke shapes for the 512-head-dim variant are deliberately the same as the 256 variant; only the manifest-shape head_dim differs. The smoke fixture exercises the same semantic shape so the canary can confirm both variants surface the same 'not_implemented' verdict structurally.
